title: Award Winning Innovation! DeHub recognised for pioneering efforts
html:
<h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mb-4 font-exo">DeHub Wins Corporate LiveWire's 2023 Innovation & Excellence Award</h2> <p class="mb-4 text-lg text-royal-blue/80">It brings us great pride to inform you all that after 27,000 votes over the last 12 months of nominations and judge scoring, DeHub is officially Corporate LiveWire's 2023 Innovation and Excellence Winner, coming in first place under the "Gaming" category.</p>

<h3 class="text-xl font-bold mt-8 mb-4 font-exo">A Prestigious, Merit-Based Award</h3> <p class="mb-4 text-royal-blue/80">Corporate LiveWire is one of the more prestigious and rigorously scored awards for the UK business and finance sectors, noted by some of the largest companies in the world. We were nominated by a member of the public and then given first place for our free-to-play-and-earn gaming arcade and streaming protocol.</p> <p class="mb-4 text-royal-blue/80">The scoring took into account a number of key variables, including customer service, community feedback, and social engagement—all the things we take pride in. This is a stringent, merit-based system, not one you can "pay to play." The Innovation and Excellence award is for startups and businesses pioneering new technology. Their other categories, as you can see on their website, are being won by some of the biggest companies in the world.</p>

<h3 class="text-xl font-bold mt-8 mb-4 font-exo">Spreading the Word</h3> <p class="mb-4 text-royal-blue/80">With over 70,000 subscribers across physical and digital channels, this award gives DeHub incredible exposure to a business-oriented, off-chain audience. We will be attending Corporate LiveWire events in Dubai, Central London, and South East UK. Once all winners have been announced on their website, we will commence press releases to make sure the world knows that our little crypto project is winning reputable awards and rubbing shoulders with some of the biggest names in the UK business and finance sector.</p>

<p class="mt-8 font-semibold text-royal-blue">The London awards ceremony is on the 27th of August, and we'd like to extend an invitation to whoever nominated us for this amazing prize. Please reach out to us via any social media, community group, or by direct email to <a href="mailto:marketing@dehub.net" class="text-middle-blue hover:underline">marketing@dehub.net</a>. A special thanks to you for making this journey more fruitful every day.</p>
md:
DeHub Wins Corporate LiveWire's 2023 Innovation & Excellence Award

It brings us great pride to inform you all that after 27,000 votes over the last 12 months of nominations and judge scoring, DeHub is officially Corporate LiveWire's 2023 Innovation and Excellence Winner, coming in first place under the "Gaming" category.

A Prestigious, Merit-Based Award

Corporate LiveWire is one of the more prestigious and rigorously scored awards for the UK business and finance sectors, noted by some of the largest companies in the world. We were nominated by a member of the public and then given first place for our free-to-play-and-earn gaming arcade and streaming protocol.

The scoring took into account a number of key variables, including customer service, community feedback, and social engagement—all the things we take pride in. This is a stringent, merit-based system, not one you can "pay to play." The Innovation and Excellence award is for startups and businesses pioneering new technology. Their other categories, as you can see on their website, are being won by some of the biggest companies in the world.

Spreading the Word

With over 70,000 subscribers across physical and digital channels, this award gives DeHub incredible exposure to a business-oriented, off-chain audience. We will be attending Corporate LiveWire events in Dubai, Central London, and South East UK. Once all winners have been announced on their website, we will commence press releases to make sure the world knows that our little crypto project is winning reputable awards and rubbing shoulders with some of the biggest names in the UK business and finance sector.

The London awards ceremony is on the 27th of August, and we'd like to extend an invitation to whoever nominated us for this amazing prize. Please reach out to us via any social media, community group, or by direct email to marketing@dehub.net. A special thanks to you for making this journey more fruitful every day.
